ayahs.translation: The Inevitable Reality -
What is the Inevitable Reality?
And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?
Thamūd and ʿAad denied the Striking Calamity [i.e., the Resurrection].
So as for Thamūd, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast].

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahs.translation: And as for ʿAad, they were destroyed by a screaming,[1737] violent wind

ayahs.arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahs.simpleArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَانِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى الْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Sakhkharaha AAalayhim sabAAa layalinwathamaniyata ayyamin husooman fataraalqawma feeha sarAAa kaannahum aAAjazunakhlin khawiya
ayahs.translation: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
Then do you see of them any remains?

ayahs.arabic: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَجَاءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُ وَالْمُؤْتَفِكَاتُ بِالْخَاطِئَةِ
ayahs.translation: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities[1738] with sin.

ayahs.arabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَعَصَوْا رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahs.translation: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَى الْمَاءُ حَمَلْنَاكُمْ فِي الْجَارِيَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna lamma taghaalmao hamalnakum fee aljariya
ayahs.translation: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried you [i.e., your ancestors] in the sailing ship[1739]

ayahs.arabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَا أُذُنٌ وَاعِيَةٌ
ayahs.translation: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ
ayahs.translation: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast

ayahs.arabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَحُمِلَتِ الْأَرْضُ وَالْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَاحِدَةً
ayahs.translation: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow [i.e., stroke] -
Then on that Day, the Occurrence [i.e., Resurrection] will occur,
And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.[1740]

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَالْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰ أَرْجَائِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَانِيَةٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Walmalaku AAala arja-ihawayahmilu AAarsha rabbika fawqahum yawma-ithin thamaniya
ayahs.translation: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahs.simpleArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahs.translation: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.[1741]

ayahs.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ فَيَقُولُ هَاؤُمُ اقْرَءُوا كِتَابِيَهْ
ayahs.transliteration: Faamma man ootiya kitabahubiyameenihi fayaqoolu haomu iqraoo kitabiyah
ayahs.translation: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."
So he will be in a pleasant life -
In an elevated garden,
Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

ayahs.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا هَنِيئًا بِمَا أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِي الْأَيَّامِ الْخَالِيَةِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kuloo washraboo hanee-an bimaaslaftum fee al-ayyami alkhaliya
ayahs.translation: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth[1742] in the days past."

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِشِمَالِهِ فَيَقُولُ يَا لَيْتَنِي لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَابِيَهْ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma man ootiya kitabahubishimalihi fayaqoolu ya laytanee lam oota kitabiyah
ayahs.translation: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
And had not known what is my account.
I wish it [i.e., my death] had been the decisive one.[1743]
My wealth has not availed me.
Gone from me is my authority."[1744]
[Allāh will say], "Seize him and shackle him.
Then into Hellfire drive him.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahs.simpleArabic: ثُمَّ فِي سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَاسْلُكُوهُ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma fee silsilatin tharAAuhasabAAoona thiraAAan faslukooh
ayahs.translation: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.simpleArabic: إِنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allāh, the Most Great,
Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.
So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend
Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;
None will eat it except the sinners.
So I swear by what you see
And what you do not see
[That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is the word of a noble Messenger.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama huwa biqawli shaAAirinqaleelan ma tu/minoon
ayahs.translation: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.
[It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
And if he [i.e., Muḥammad] had made up about Us some [false] sayings,
We would have seized him by the right hand;[1745]
Then We would have cut from him the aorta.[1746]

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
ayahs.simpleArabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَاجِزِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama minkum min ahadin AAanhu hajizeen
ayahs.translation: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.
And indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a reminder for the righteous.
And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.
And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers.
And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.
So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
